patch.comment: Patch release after version normalization to major 3.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

patch.comment: Dummy patch release to republish after npm token incident.
patch.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Release a new major version with positioning engine refactors, updated placement behavior, and breaking API changes for floating UI configuration.
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>

major.comment: Major release: floating-element positioning engine with positionFloat() for inline-style application and computePosition() for headless usage; middleware pipeline with offset, flip, shift, and size helpers; autoUpdate() for scroll/resize tracking with cleanup; support for all 12 placement values (top/bottom/left/right with start/end alignment); fixed and absolute positioning strategies; zero dependencies
major.author: Helmuth Saatkamp <helmuthdu@gmail.com>
